Sponsorships / Epic Water Filters

Epic Water Filters

miscellaneous
Affiliate
15% Commission
affiliate
Apply Now → Visit Website

Overview

Epic Water Filters was founded by Ash Heather in April 2015. Having just moved to the United States from Asia and witnessing first hand plastic bottle pollution on the beaches and in the rivers that got him thinking —  there had to be a solution. It started with developing a bottle with a robust filter in it, allowing people to drink and enjoy their tap water without using single use plastic bottles.

One “Everyday” bottle filter removes 70+ tap water contaminants and replaces 550+ single use plastic bottles! We have an exclusive partnership with Nalgene that allows us to offer a variety of filtered water bottles in different shapes, sizes, and colors. We even make our own bottles that vary from glass to insulated stainless steel. So if you’re looking for something sleek and slim, or big and rugged, we’ve got you covered.

The Epic Syndicate

Why Join?

Epic Water Filters is committed to reducing single-use plastics by providing a more sustainable option. Join their mission of making clean water accessible everywhere.

The Benefits

  • 15% Commissions for each sale
  • Automatic monthly payouts
  • Easy to use affiliate dashboards with quick access to information and creative assets
  • Multi-patented products with the greatest reduction per contaminant in the industry
  • Help spread the message about the harmful effects of single use plastics and increase the accessibility of clean water around the globe
  • Dedicated affiliate manager on staff Why You?

Each Syndicate team member will gain access to the latest news, exclusive gear and products! This select group of Epic Syndicate members are adventurers, advocates, and well-respected members of their communities with whom we are proud to partner. We love to see the ways these outstanding individuals champion the Epic Water Filters brand by sharing their uses of our products, helping to conserve the environment which we live in & help to achieve extraordinary results throughout the course of their adventurers and daily lives.

FOS Affiliate Program

This sponsorship is part of our affiliate network.
